name: Fresh Herb Turkey Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a medium bowl, combine all ingredients except turkey.
3. Add the ground turkey and mix well until everything is evenly incorporated.
4. Mold the mixture into a loaf pan.
5. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes or until no longer pink.
6. Remove from oven and pat dry with paper towels.
7. Cut into 6 slices.
